name: Crispy Chicken Wings Dgsv43a
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken wings into two pieces, discarding the tips.
2. In a small shallow bowl, combine butter and garlic powder.
3. In another bowl, combine remaining ingredients (bread crumbs, salt, parsley, parmesan cheese, pepper).
4. Dip chicken into butter mixture, then into crumb mixture.
5. Place on greased cookie sheet; bake at 350 degrees for 50 to 60 minutes or until done.
